ansible-creator.q: What is the primary purpose of ansible-creator?
opts: To run Ansible playbooks in parallel
To scaffold new Ansible collections, roles, and plugins
To lint YAML files for syntax errors
To manage container images for Ansible

ansible-creator.q: Which command scaffolds a new collection with ansible-creator?
What does ansible-creator generate as part of a new collection?
opts: A running container with ansible-core pre-installed
SSH keys for connecting to managed hosts
The proper directory layout, galaxy.yml, tests, and metadata

ansible-lint.q: What is the primary purpose of ansible-lint?
opts: To enforce best practices and detect issues in Ansible content

ansible-lint.q: Which command runs ansible-lint against a playbook named site.yml?

opts: Network latency issues during playbook execution
Deprecated modules, risky patterns, and style violations
Missing SSH keys on managed hosts
Incorrect inventory group names at runtime

ade.q: What does ade (Ansible Dev Environment) manage?
Which command installs a collection in editable mode with ade?

opts: The git commit history of the project
A visual map of inventory hosts

molecule.q: What is Molecule primarily used for?
opts: Linting Ansible playbooks for style issues
Full integration testing of Ansible roles and collections

molecule.q: What is the correct Molecule test lifecycle order?
opts: dependency → create → prepare → converge → verify → destroy

molecule.q: Which Molecule command runs only the playbook without the full lifecycle?

opts: A standalone test runner for Ansible
A pytest plugin for testing Ansible modules and plugins
A CI/CD pipeline tool for Ansible projects
A linter extension for pytest configuration

pytest-ansible.q: What fixture does pytest-ansible provide to call Ansible modules directly?
What type of testing does pytest-ansible excel at?
opts: Full integration testing with live infrastructure
Unit and functional testing of individual modules
Performance and load testing of playbooks
Docker images on the local registry
Test scenarios across multiple Python and ansible-core versions
SSH keys and vault passwords in the project

tox-ansible.q: Which command lists all discovered tox-ansible test environments?
What configuration principle does tox-ansible follow for test discovery?

opts: Execution Environments — container images with ansible-core and dependencies

ansible-builder.q: What file defines an Execution Environment for ansible-builder?
Which ansible-builder command generates the Containerfile without actually building the image?

ansible-sign.q: What cryptographic system does ansible-sign use to sign projects?
What file does ansible-sign use to declare which files to include in the signature?
Which command verifies a signed Ansible project?

ansible-navigator.q: What type of interface does ansible-navigator provide?
How do you run a playbook with a specific Execution Environment in ansible-navigator?
